ddls:
CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the notification has been read or not */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feed where the notification was generated */,
  "from_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the notification */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, like) */,
  "message" TEXT /* The content of the notification */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the notification was sent */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_notification_type FOREIGN KEY ("notification_type") REFERENCES notification_types ("notification_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_from_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES notification_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feed */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the feed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feed was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feed was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the feed is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the user account is active or not */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_types" (
  "notification_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification type */,
  "notification_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the notification type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the notification type is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the channel was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the channel is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the preference */,
  "notification_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification type */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., immediate, daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the preference is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_notification_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_type_id") REFERENCES notification_types ("notification_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES notification_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the notification was sent */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the notification history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_history_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_history_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES notification_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the notification */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., read, clicked) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the notification was sent */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES notification_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the role is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the permission is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator whether the user role is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friend_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friend request */,
  "from_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the request */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friend request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friend request was last updated */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the friend request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friend_requests_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friend_requests_from_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "from_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was last updated */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_from_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
